About

The short version.

If you need it, I can do it. I lead sets as a 1st AD, jump in as production support wherever needed, and know Montana well enough to get you connected with the right crew, vendors & locations.

How I show up.

Calm under pressure

Easy to work with

Positive & personable

Adaptable & quick thinker

Open to production work in Montana and beyond.

Narrative or commercial, big crew or small. Let's talk about your next project.

Get in touch →
